vegetable.name: Cabbage
vegetable.description: A well-balanced vegetable that can be eaten raw, fried or boiled. Helps with digestion after a big meal.

vegetable.name: Pumpkin
vegetable.description: A nutritious seasonal vegetable. Can be worn during the autumn festival by scooping out the inside.

vegetable.name: Doom Pumpkin
vegetable.description: A nutritious seasonal vegetable. Can be worn during the autumn festival by scooping out the inside. A gourd of doom.

plant.name: Toyherb
plant.description: An herb that promotes good health. Hard to grow, but cures fatigue.

plant.name: Ultra Toyherb
plant.description: An herb that promotes good health. Hard to grow, but cures fatigue.

plant.name: Moondrop Flower
plant.description: A unique and beautiful yellow flower that grows in the moonlight.

plant.name: Ultra Moondrop Flower
plant.description: A unique and beautiful yellow flower that grows in the moonlight.

plant.name: Pink Cat
plant.description: Flower with vibrant pink blossoms. Named 'cat' for its cuteness.

plant.name: King Pink Cat
plant.description: Flower with vibrant pink blossoms. Named 'cat' for its cuteness.

plant.name: Charm Blue
plant.description: A deep blue flower. Practically swallows you into its beautiful blossoms.

plant.name: Great Charm Blue
plant.description: A deep blue flower. Practically swallows you into its beautiful blossoms.

plant.name: Medicinal Herb
plant.description: A wild herb with a bitter taste. Helps regain energy.

plant.name: Antidote Grass
plant.description: A grass that purifies poison in the body. Very bitter, but effective.

plant.name: Black Grass
plant.description: Grass with a dull, mysterious glow like muffled black light. Hard to see at night, so it's often stepped on.

plant.name: Orange Grass
plant.description: Grass as orange as the sun. Its bright color gives you energy just by looking at it.

plant.name: Red Grass
plant.description: Grass of passion. Its red color helps it grow faster than other grasses.

plant.name: Yellow Grass
plant.description: Grass which brings you luck. People carry it in hopes that it will make them rich.

plant.name: Blue Grass
plant.description: A nifty blue grass that's cold to the touch. Used in medicine due to its soothing effect.

plant.name: Green Grass
plant.description: Plain green grass. Trying hard to change so people will stop calling it boring.

plant.name: Purple Grass
plant.description: A sophisticated purple grass. Has trouble getting along with the other grasses due to its massive ego.

plant.name: Indigo Grass
plant.description: Soothing grass that supposedly resolves arguments just by being there.

plant.name: White Grass
plant.description: Beautiful grass of purest white. Hard to find in winter since it blends in with the snow. Fragile, but noble.

plant.name: Weeds
plant.description: Grows anywhere, anytime. It doesn't obey any rules. It does its down thing. And that's why it's cool.

plant.name: Withered Grass
plant.description: You'd get sick if you ate this grass, but it can be used to improve the quality of soil.

plant.name: Cherry Grass
plant.description: A plant that works hard to be prettier than all the other flowers. Other flowers sometimes sneer, but they're just jealous. Can be found in spring.

plant.name: King Cherry Grass
plant.description: A plant that works hard to be prettier than all the other flowers. Other flowers sometimes sneer, but they're just jealous. Can be found in spring.

plant.name: Lamp Grass
plant.description: A grass with luminous powder all throughout its blossomed stem. Has a strong calming effect.

plant.name: Kaiser Lamp Grass
plant.description: A grass with luminous powder all throughout its blossomed stem. Has a strong calming effect.

plant.name: Blue Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears blue during spring.

plant.name: Big Blue Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears blue during spring.

plant.name: Emery Flower
plant.description: A unique golden flower that's extremely tough and resilient. Don't step on it or it'll really hurt!

plant.name: Great Emery Flower
plant.description: A unique golden flower that's extremely tough and resilient. Don't step on it or it'll really hurt!

plant.name: Ironleaf
plant.description: A plant with many spikes. Its unique shape is the result of iron content collected from the ground.

plant.name: Super Ironleaf
plant.description: A plant with 1000 spikes. Its unique shape is the result of iron content collected from the ground.

plant.name: 4-Leaf Clover
plant.description: A plant which brings you good luck. Carry it around or make it a gift, and happiness will follow you!

plant.name: Great 4-Leaf Clover
plant.description: A plant which brings you good luck. Carry it around or make it a gift, and happiness will follow you!

plant.name: Fireflower
plant.description: A flower with a unique shape. Also called the 'Mountain Fireworks,' as you can almost hear the sounds of exploding powder when you pluck it.

plant.name: Big Fireflower
plant.description: A flower with a unique shape. Also called the 'Mountain Fireworks,' as you can almost hear the sounds of exploding powder when you pluck it.

plant.name: Green Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears green during summer.

plant.name: Big Green Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears green during summer.

plant.name: Noel Grass
plant.description: Weirdly tree-shaped plant. Can be fun to decorate in winter.

plant.name: Large Noel Grass
plant.description: Weirdly tree-shaped plant. Can be fun to decorate in winter.

plant.name: Autumn Grass
plant.description: A plant which grows colorful flowers. Named as it is due to its autumnal color scheme.

plant.name: Big Autumn Grass
plant.description: A plant which grows colorful flowers. Named as it is due to its autumnal color scheme.

plant.name: Pom-Pom Grass
plant.description: Has white cotton-like flowers in its center. Looks cute like a dandelion, but is poisonous, so say no to the blow!

plant.name: King Pom-Pom Grass
plant.description: Has white cotton-like flowers in its center. Looks cute like a dandelion, but is poisonous, so say no to the blow!

plant.name: Red Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears red during autumn.

plant.name: Big Red Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears red during autumn.

plant.name: White Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears white during winter.

plant.name: Big White Crystal
plant.description: A flower made of rune crystals that mixed together in the ground. Appears white during winter.

plant.name: Ayngondaia Lawn
plant.description: A rare plant. Imbued with incredible vitality, rumor has it that this bright bounty has rejuvenating qualities.

plant.name: Elli Leaves
plant.description: An exotic plant with a dark, blue flower. Beautiful!

seed.name: Turnip Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from summer to fall. Most common crop in the game, for some reason.

seed.name: Potato Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Grows beautiful flowers.

seed.name: Cucumber Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting

seed.name: Strawberry Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring and fall. Bears sweet fruits. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Cabbage Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring and fall. Grows fast, and rarely withers.

seed.name: Moondrop Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in winter. An easy flower to grow.

seed.name: Toyherb Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring but not in winter. A fast grower, but delicate and tough to harvest. Cures fatigue if fully grown.

seed.name: Tomato Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Grows nutritious tomatoes. May grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Corn Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Improves the soil til you till it without harvesting.

seed.name: Onion Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall. Easy to harvest and easy on the soil

seed.name: Pumpkin Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Easy on the soil. May grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Pineapple Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in summer, but not in other seasons. Takes time to grow. May grow again after harvesting, but tough on soil.

seed.name: Pink Cat Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Grows fast, is easy to harvest, but withers fast.

seed.name: Eggplant Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Carrot Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall. A well-balanced crop that's easy on the soil.

seed.name: Yam Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from summer to fall, but not in winter. Easy on the soil.

seed.name: Spinach Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall. Grows fast, but withers quickly. Don't forget to water it every day!

seed.name: Green Pepper Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Highly nutritious. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Charm Blue Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Easy to grow, with a good balance of growth rate and resilience.

seed.name: Fodder Seeds
seed.description: Grow feed for the monsters. Hearty ones may grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Cherry Grass Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring, but not in winter. Grows a light pink flower.

seed.name: Lamp Grass Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Mainly used as an ingredient in medicines.

seed.name: Blue Crystal Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles blue crystal.

seed.name: Emery Flower Seeds
seed.description: Takes a very long time to grow. Rarely withers, and can be cultivated by almost anyone.

seed.name: Ironleaf Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes a long time to grow. Has a special power to gather iron from the soil.

seed.name: Clover Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in summer. A lucky seed that brings good fortune, but withers very easily.

seed.name: Fireflower Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in summer, but not in winter. Its seeds are as black as gunpowder.

seed.name: Green Crystal Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in Summer, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles green crystal.

seed.name: Noel Grass Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes a long time to grow but rarely withers. Used in certain festivals.

seed.name: Autumn Grass Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed is red and round.

seed.name: Pom-Pom Grass Sds.
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in winter. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed is white and soft.

seed.name: Red Crystal Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles a red crystal.

seed.name: White Crystal Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in other seasons. Takes a long time to grow. Its seed resembles a white crystal.

seed.name: Pink Turnip Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring, but not in winter. Grows a beautiful pink turnip. Easy to harvest. Popular with novice farmers.

seed.name: Radish Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in summer. Has a good balance of growth rate and resilience. Easy on the soil.

seed.name: Leek Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in spring and fall, but not in summer. Withers fairly easily, but is easy on the soil.

seed.name: Bok Choy Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in fall, but not in summer. Weak to heat.

seed.name: Gold Cabbage Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden cabbage.

seed.name: Gold Pumpkin Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden pumpkin. May grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Gold Potato Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden potato.

seed.name: Gold Turnip Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Grows into a gorgeous golden turnip.

seed.name: Pink Melon Seeds
seed.description: Grows well from spring to summer, but not in winter. Cultivated by a cute girl. May grow again after harvesting.

seed.name: Hot-Hot Seeds
seed.description: Grows well in winter, but not in summer. Takes some time to grow, but is easy to harvest and doesn't wither easily.

seed.name: Apple Tree Seeds
seed.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Once it grows into a tree, it will produce apples every day.

seed.name: Orange Tree Seed
seed.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Once it grows into a tree, it will produce orances every day.

seed.name: Grape Tree Seeds
seed.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Once it grows into a tree, it will produce grapes every day.

seed.name: Twinkle Seed
seed.description: Doesn't grow well in winter. Produces a lot of lumber. May produce ore.

seed.name: Dungeon Seed
seed.description: Grows into a dungeon. Depending on the level of the seed, it may bloom into a particularly difficult one.

seed.name: Sword Seed
seed.description: Grows into a sword. Neat, huh?

seed.name: Shield Seed
seed.description: Grows into a shield. Cool, right?

medicine.name: The Protein
medicine.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum strength. Get fit, brah.

medicine.name: Intelligencer
medicine.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum intelligence.

medicine.name: Vital Gummi
medicine.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum vitality.

medicine.name: Heart Drink
medicine.description: A specially made medicine. Increases maximum HP.

medicine.name: Antidote Potion
medicine.description: Easier to take than herbs. Used for curing poison.

medicine.name: Para-Gone
medicine.description: Medicine that cures paralysis.

medicine.name: Roundoff
medicine.description: Medicine that dissolves seals.

medicine.name: Cold Medicine
medicine.description: Caught a cold? Nine out of ten doctors agree this medicine will cure it. And the tenth one is a quack.

medicine.name: Formuade
medicine.description: RP+75% HP max -50% STR +70 VIT +70 INT +70 Crit +20% Psn Res 25% Seal Res 25% Par Res 25% Slp Res 25% Ftg Res 25% Sick Res 25%Faint Res 25%Medicine made from fertilizer. Tastes awful, but whatever doesn't kill you can only make you stronger, right?

medicine.name: Leveliser
medicine.description: A medicine made from a hodge-podge of things. Heats your body and increases your level.

medicine.name: Recovery Potion
medicine.description: A light green-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

medicine.name: Healing Potion
medicine.description: A deep green-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

medicine.name: Mystery Potion
medicine.description: A blue-colored medicinal drink. Recovers HP.

medicine.name: Magical Potion
medicine.description: One of the greatest achievements of magic medical science. Was only possible through the greatest of efforts.

medicine.name: Object X
medicine.description: A substance created from a failed Synthesis. How did it happen? Who knows, but it's not for eating. Seriously.

medicine.name: Wettable Powder
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to make plants stronger against typhoons and snowstorms.

medicine.name: Greenifier
medicine.description: An item used to raise soil quality. Improves soil's ability to grow higher-level crops.

medicine.name: Greenifier+
medicine.description: An item used to raise soil quality. Improves soil's ability to grow higher-level crops.

medicine.name: Formula A
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's somewhat effective.

medicine.name: Formula B
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's pretty effective.

medicine.name: Formula C
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow crops faster. It's super effective!

medicine.name: No Rot α
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to prevent plants from wilting.

medicine.name: No Rot β
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to prevent plants from wilting. It's more effective than the α version.

medicine.name: Giantizer
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow gargantuan produce.

medicine.name: Minimizer
medicine.description: Sprinkle on soil to grow smaller plants. Also makes soil healthier.

fists.name: Leather Gloves
fists.description: They're for protecting your fists rather than attacking. Since there are holes for fingers, it's easy to grab monsters.

fists.name: Brass Knuckles
fists.description: A lethal weapon mainly used by Goblin gangs.

fists.name: Kote
fists.description: A weapon that can be used as armor.

fists.name: Bear Claws
fists.description: A weapon that looks like the claws of a bear.

fists.name: Fists of Fire
fists.description: Burning iron gauntlets. We all are friends after a fight!

fists.name: Fists of Water
fists.description: Cold iron gauntlets. They can deliver merciless blows.

fists.name: Fist of Wind
fists.description: Sharp iron gauntlets. It's important to draw your punches quickly for maximum effect.

fists.name: Fists of the Earth
fists.description: Heavy iron gauntlets. They make you feel powerful and grounded.

fists.name: Fists of Light
fists.description: Shiny iron gauntlets. So bright they make you want sunglasses.

fists.name: Fists of Dark
fists.description: Evil iron gauntlets. This is the power gained by giving your heart to the dark side.

fists.name: Gloves
fists.description: These are for protecting your fists. Pretty basic, really.

fists.name: Cat Punch
fists.description: A weapon in the shape of a cat's paws. Although it looks soft, the claw parts seriously hurts.

fists.name: Dragon Claws
fists.description: A weapon made from dragon claws. Can even cut steel.

fists.name: Animal Puppets
fists.description: A useful tool to have when performing a skit alone, but as a weapon...

fists.name: Ironleaf Fists
fists.description: Hurts, of course. Be careful not to stab yourself instead.

fists.name: Golem Punch
fists.description: Learning the way of the Golem's punch. It's sad that they don't fly off.

fists.name: Hand of God
fists.description: A.k.a. God hand.

fists.name: Caestus
fists.description: It's said that ancient boxers used them.

fists.name: Bazal Katar
fists.description: a foreign weapon that looks like a sword. Actually, it's called a jamadhar.

fists.name: Fenrir
fists.description: A weapon shaped in the shape of a wolf-like monster that can swallow gods.

shortSword.name: Broadsword
shortSword.description: A light, easy-to-use sword. Recommended for beginners. Some even use it for cooking.

shortSword.name: Steel Sword
shortSword.description: A short sword forged from steel. Has a longer than average blade that gives you an extended reach.

shortSword.name: Wind Sword
shortSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Each swing spawns a miniature gale.

shortSword.name: Aqua Sword
shortSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of water. Its blade is always wet.

shortSword.name: Defender
shortSword.description: A sword designed to be used with a shield. Raises resistance toward incoming attacks and knockouts.

shortSword.name: Aerial Blade
shortSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Its magical power makes it lighter than other swords.

shortSword.name: Burning Sword
shortSword.description: A sword with a fiery blade. One touch and you'll be burned.

shortSword.name: Sakura
shortSword.description: A cursed red sword. Though it has a beautiful name, its edge is coated with poison.

shortSword.name: Luck Blade
shortSword.description: A sword that brings fortune to its wielder. You should totally buy a lottery ticket!

shortSword.name: Platinum Sword
shortSword.description: A sword made form fine platinum. Highly durable. Makes its bearer more popular just havin- Hey, what are you doing later tonight?

shortSword.name: Raventine
shortSword.description: A short sword with high heat. According to legend, it's said to have once turned a lake into a hot spring.

shortSword.name: Icifier
shortSword.description: The chill from this sword freezes water in the air. Perfect for making shaved ice.

shortSword.name: Soul Eater
shortSword.description: a magical sword that eats souls. It has the power to take away an enemy's life.

shortSword.name: Smash Blade
shortSword.description: A sword designed to target foe's vital points, no matter what style of form you use.

shortSword.name: Dragon Slayer
shortSword.description: A sword in the shape of three dragon heads. the three often fight over who's the best.

shortSword.name: Sunspot
shortSword.description: A sword as hot as the sun. Some say it's so hot that it turns everything it strikes to ash.

shortSword.name: Star Sabre
shortSword.description: A short sword with a swing as beautiful as a shooting star. Just swing it, and bam, you're a superstar!

shortSword.name: Gaia Sword
shortSword.description: A sword imbued wiht the magic power of earth. Because it's made from very hard material, it won't chip easily.

shortSword.name: Grantale
shortSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of earth. Very tough, and guaranteed not to break or your money back!

shortSword.name: Chaos Blade
shortSword.description: Companion to the Chaos Shield. Chooses its bearer with its magical power.

shortSword.name: Rune Blade
shortSword.description: A treasured sword with rune power. The light beaming from it casts no shadow.

shortSword.name: Steel Sword+
shortSword.description: A strengthened version of the Steel Sword. Born anew with freshly-colored blades.

shortSword.name: Platinum Sword+
shortSword.description: A strengthened version of the Platinum Sword. Radiates light from its upgraded platinum.

shortSword.name: Cutlass
shortSword.description: An old sword that belonged to pirates. Sailors carry them as charms.

shortSword.name: Back Scratcher
shortSword.description: A sword (?) used to scratch itchy backs. Maybe your foes will freak out when they see it?

shortSword.name: Durendal
shortSword.description: A sword with a shining blade. You can attack your foes while they're captivated by its radiant beauty.

shortSword.name: Gladius
shortSword.description: A short sword forged through years of disciplined smithing. Like, real sharp and stuff.

shortSword.name: Gorgeous Sword
shortSword.description: A gorgeous and dazzling sword which shines with an elegance like that of freshly-fallen snow.

shortSword.name: Spoon
shortSword.description: A magic sword that somehow makes people want to eat pudding.

shortSword.name: Rune Legend
shortSword.description: Swordsmen call this a legendary short sword. The runes imbued on its blade shine majestically.

shortSword.name: Snakesword
shortSword.description: A sword made by connecting small bits of metal into one whip-like blade. Long-ranged and hard to avoid.

shortSword.name: Veggieblade
shortSword.description: A vegetable used as a sword. I wonder how much damage it can cause...

shortSword.name: Invisiblade
shortSword.description: Can you see the true blade?

shortSword.name: Plant Sword
shortSword.description: A sword made from a plant. The more passionately you tend it, the bigger it grows and the stronger it becomes.

longSword.name: Claymore
longSword.description: A long sword that's easy to swing. Has a fun ring on it that you can play with. (But don't try it at home!)

longSword.name: Zweihaender
longSword.description: A large two-handed sword. Not much else to say -- it's very straight-forward and to the point, if you know what I mean.

longSword.name: Flame Saber
longSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of fire. A single swing will make you drip with sweat. Kind of icky to use, really.

longSword.name: Cyclone Blade
longSword.description: A sword imbued with the magic power of wind. Its thin bllade has small holes in it to allow for air to pass through.

longSword.name: Dancing Dicer
longSword.description: A weapon brought from the Far East.With its sharp edges, you can sometimes cut down foes in a single blow.

longSword.name: Great Sword
longSword.description: A long sword designed to never dull or need sharpening. Balandced and easy to hold.

longSword.name: Heaven Asunder
longSword.description: A legendary sword with a sharp blade that can pierce clouds. High chance of knocking down foes in a single blow.

longSword.name: Grand Smasher
longSword.description: A long sword with spiky edges. Imbued with earth power, its spikes are designed to look like mountains.

longSword.name: Blue-Eyed Blade
longSword.description: Makes its bearer's eyes shine blue, and grants the power to see an opponent's skill. Increases critical chance.

longSword.name: Poison Blade
longSword.description: A longsword with a poison-covered blade. So dangerous that even a small scratch can kill you.

longSword.name: Steel Slicer
longSword.description: Supposedly can cut through anything -- thus the name.

longSword.name: Flamberge
longSword.description: A sword with a uniquely shaped blade. So beautiful, it's often used in ceremonies.

longSword.name: Shine Blade
longSword.description: A sword with a high-heat blade and an ice-cold tip. Even evil hearts are soothed by its shiny glow.

longSword.name: Earth Shade
longSword.description: A sword blessed by mother nature. Has an interesting design that looks kind of like a fault line.

longSword.name: Bio Smasher
longSword.description: A poisoned long sword with jagged edges. Designed to spread poison thoroughly.

longSword.name: Punisher
longSword.description: a long sword with a wide blade. Hurts worse than an atomic wedgie.

longSword.name: Sea Cutter
longSword.description: A sword that can supposedly divide the sea. Listen closely and you'll hear the sound of ocean waves.

longSword.name: Volcanon
longSword.description: A sword imbued with fire. Beams out strong light. So hot, it raises the room temperature by 10 degrees.

longSword.name: Snow Crown
longSword.description: A long sword imbued with water power. When plunged into snow, not a single flake will melt.

longSword.name: Moon Shadow
longSword.description: A weapon from the Far East. Appears as naught but a shadow under cover of night. Can take down foes in a single blow.

longSword.name: Force Element
longSword.description: A lighted long sword. Contains strong elemental power, making it hard to use.

longSword.name: Zweihaender+
longSword.description: Zweihaender strengthened with special power. Hurts worse than a wedgie.

longSword.name: Flamberge+
longSword.description: Flamberge strengthened with magic power. Its thin blade makes it easy to use.

longSword.name: Katzbalger
longSword.description: A smartly-designed sword with a aerodynamic shape that makes it easy to swing.

longSword.name: Big Knife
longSword.description: A knife with a large blade. So large, in fact, that one cannot easily cut apples with it. Unless they're REALLY BIG.

longSword.name: Katana
longSword.description: A weapon from the Far East. Beautiful, strong and sharp. In rare cases, you may knock down foes with a single blow.

longSword.name: Balmung
longSword.description: A long sword with sleek lines. Though it's big, it's designed to be aerodynamic and easy to handle.

longSword.name: Psycho
longSword.description: A uniquely-shaped long sword. Its three blades have assorted curses on them, inflicting numerous status ailments.

longSword.name: Dekash
longSword.description: Smells like fish, so it tends to attract cats.

longSword.name: Braveheart
longSword.description: A rare long sword with a glittering blade. Its bearer's courage gives it strength.

longSword.name: Belzebuth
longSword.description: Short-ranged, but has magical power strong enough to steal an enemy's life. High chance of landing critical hits.

longSword.name: Daicone
longSword.description: A daikon radish so large and strong that it became a viable weapon. It dreamed big.

longSword.name: Caliburn
longSword.description: a legendary calorie-burning sword. Few believe it exists. but here it is!

longSword.name: Orochi
longSword.description: A sword separated into several parts, making it easy to wrap around foes. Capable of hitting far away enemies.

spear.name: Spear
spear.description: A very simple spear, good for beginners. So simple that it's often used as a skewer for food.

spear.name: Lance
spear.description: Has a unique triangular shape. Said to have been used in a war fought by an ancient empire.

spear.name: Needle Spear
spear.description: A spear with a long blade. Has many uses and a high rate of owner satisfaction. A+++ would wield again!

spear.name: Halberd
spear.description: A spear used for various purposes -- though most involve stabbing and cutting, as you might imagine.

spear.name: Water Spear
spear.description: A Spear imbued with the magic power of water. It's always wet. Be careful not to let it slip out of your hands!

spear.name: Blood Lance
spear.description: A cursed spear. Its two blades remind you of a warlock.

spear.name: Wood Staff
spear.description: A hard, wooden club. It might hurt more to hit with it than to stab with it.

spear.name: Poison Spear
spear.description: A poisoned spear. Has a wide blade, making it easy to spread poison.

spear.name: Corsesca
spear.description: A spear with a wide blade. Its shape was decided after many experiments trying to forge a high-accuracy blade.

spear.name: Silent Grave
spear.description: A spear with a removable knife-like blade at its tip. Has a sealing effect on enemies.

spear.name: Flare Lance
spear.description: A spear that lets out high heat. The closer to the tip, the hotter it gets. Perhaps it can cure back pain.

spear.name: Heavy Lance
spear.description: A lance designed with a focus on attack power only, to the detriment of everything else. Heavy and hard to wield.

spear.name: Iceberg
spear.description: A spear imbued with water power. Designed to work even underwater, Stab the fish, and you won't need a rod!

spear.name: Metus
spear.description: A spear shaped to dig holes. Those who are struck by it have little hope of survival, thanks to its hidden might.

spear.name: Monk Staff
spear.description: A nicely decorated stick with adjustable length.

spear.name: Overbreak
spear.description: A spear with a huge blade. Every swing makes the enemy flinch. Maybe swinging will be enough!

spear.name: Brionac
spear.description: A spear so strong that it can penetrate anything. According to legend, it made a hole in the mountains with one stab!

spear.name: Feather Lance
spear.description: A spear imbued with the magic power of Wind. Lift it up to the sky and it will pierce the heavens.

spear.name: Belvarose
spear.description: Spear with spikes at the end. Requires skill to use, but as you grow accustomed to it, you can easily land knockouts.

spear.name: Bjor
spear.description: A spear drenched in all available poisons. Has various effects.

spear.name: Gungnir
spear.description: A legendary spear that can blow away storms. Its wind speed is so fast, though, that the bearer is equally at risk.

spear.name: Lance+
spear.description: Lance strengthened by magical power. From tip to handle, it sparkles gorgeously in gold.

spear.name: Corsesca+
spear.description: Corsesca strengthened by magical power. At half it's original weight, it's very easy to wield.

spear.name: Trident
spear.description: A three-pronged spear. Some lose their memory in shock when stabbed with it.

spear.name: Pitchfork
spear.description: Origin of kitchen forks. Bit big for cake, though. And spaghetti? Fahgeddabouddit!

spear.name: Dragon's Fang
spear.description: A spear as sharp as a dragon fang. The blade vibrates faster as danger approaches.

spear.name: Gáe Bolg
spear.description: A fierce spear with a trident-like shape. Every stab hurts.

spear.name: Magical Lance
spear.description: A lance with magical power so strong that its entire form changes in color rapidly.

spear.name: Safety Lance
spear.description: A lance with its tip covered in cotton and cloth. Still hurts, though. We can stab if we want to!

spear.name: Legion
spear.description: A lance with blades orbiting it. Foes can try to dodge, but these phantom blades ensure they won't make it very far.

spear.name: Poison Queen
spear.description: A lance drenched in poisons from around the world. Handle with care, or you, too, may be poisoned.

spear.name: Pine Club
spear.description: A lance that resembles a pineapple. Its surface stings. The creator of this lance must have been very...unique.

spear.name: Fivestaff
spear.description: A long-ranged lance that seems almost as if it were made of blades, from tip to handle, Can also be swung.

hammer.name: Battle Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer well-suited to blowing foes away -- or at least knocking them out.

hammer.name: War Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer much heavier than it looks. Be careful when swinging it -- it bites back!

hammer.name: Great Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer designed to eliminate shock when used. Very nicely balanced.

hammer.name: Schnabel
hammer.description: A hammer designed to be small and light. Has good overall balance.

hammer.name: Gigant Hammer
hammer.description: A large hammer. be careful not to hit yourself!

hammer.name: Mjolnir
hammer.description: A hammer imbued with earth power. It's said to cause earthquakes if three of them hit the ground at once.

hammer.name: Spiked Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer outfitted with spikes. Can easily score critical hits, hammer or no.

hammer.name: Flame Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer with fire power on one side. The flame helps enhance its damage output.

hammer.name: Ice Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer made of ice. Good for smashing things on a hot day. Refreshing!

hammer.name: Sky Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer with wings. Very light and easy to use.

hammer.name: Graviton Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer imbued with earth power. Designed not to hurt your hands during attack.

hammer.name: Bone Hammer
hammer.description: A light but strong hammer made from bones.

hammer.name: Crystal Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer imbued with water power. Its hard head and spikes cause major damage.

hammer.name: War Hammer+
hammer.description: War Hammer imbued with magical power. Causes less strain on the back.

hammer.name: Gigant Hammer+
hammer.description: Gigant Hammer imbued with magical power. Originally owned by high-ranking giants. Has engravings of their names.

hammer.name: Hammer
hammer.description: Farming hammer given a quickie reforge for battle-readiness. Tougher than it looks.

hammer.name: Toy Hammer
hammer.description: Anyone hit by this hammer must pretend that it really hurts. It's the law! Raises chance of knockouts.

hammer.name: Fatal Crush
hammer.description: A hammer way beyond standard size. Long-ranged, and has a high chance of landing critical hits.

hammer.name: Strong Stone
hammer.description: Large chunks of metal are connected to its head. High in attack due to its heavy weight.

hammer.name: Kongo
hammer.description: Made by fusing together chunks of metal. Long -ranged, but hard to handle.

hammer.name: Bat
hammer.description: A wooden bat used in baseball. Only kids in striped shorts make a weapon like this their first choice.

hammer.name: Iron Bat
hammer.description: An iron bat used in baseball. Not designed as weaponry, but beggars can't be choosers... Mayber you'll hit a home run!

hammer.name: Splash Star
hammer.description: Hammer made by using magical power. As its name implies, it looks like splashing stars.

hammer.name: Cheap Hammer
hammer.description: An old, rusty hammer. Too old to be charged. Used to flatten soil.

hammer.name: Iron Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with bronze. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

hammer.name: Silver Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with silver. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

hammer.name: Golden Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer reinforced with gold. Can be charged to cover wider areas. Used to flatten soil.

hammer.name: Platinum Hammer
hammer.description: A hammer made from platinum. Shorter time needed to charge, making it highly efficient. Used to flatten soil.

axe.name: Battle Axe
axe.description: An axe with a great deal of force behind it. Must be used carefully. Has a high chance of landing critical hits.

axe.name: Pole Axe
axe.description: An axe with a crescent moon-shaped blade. Has a pointy end as well. Choppy-choppy OR stabby-stabby. You decide!

axe.name: Alldale
axe.description: An axe with two golden blades. Called angel wings, they are both strong and beautiful.

axe.name: Great Axe
axe.description: An axe with improved balance. Often thought of as a go-to axe when you're just not sure what weapon to use.

axe.name: Demon Axe
axe.description: An axe possessed by an evil spirit ever since it cut down a cursed tree.

axe.name: Crescent Axe
axe.description: An axe with a sleek edge. Its center is unbalanced, however, so it's hard to hold it straight.

axe.name: Executioner
axe.description: An axe with a sketchy past. Was imbued with dark power while trying to raise its attack.

axe.name: Heat Axe
axe.description: An axe with burning blades. Nicknamed 'Phoenix Feather,' it serves as a symbol of regeneration.

axe.name: Frost Axe
axe.description: An axe with an icy cold blade. Freezes while it cuts, ensuring less pain for more humane murdering.

axe.name: Tomahawk
axe.description: An axe with a single blade. The tassel on its edge is always blowing in the wind.

axe.name: Rock Axe
axe.description: Has one of the hardest blades of any axe. As a result, it's also one of the heaviest axes around.

axe.name: Double Edge
axe.description: A well-balanced axe with double blades. Highly regarded for its strength and ease of use.

axe.name: Saint Axe
axe.description: A holy axe with sacred powers. Originally forged for use in rituals, not battle, making it a bit unwieldy.

axe.name: Pole Axe+
axe.description: A pole axe strengthened with magical power. Easier to hold and has greater balance.

axe.name: Crescent Axe+
axe.description: A crescent axe strengthened with magical power. A true masterpiece designed to be easy to wield.

axe.name: Axe
axe.description: Originally a farming axe, it's excited to join you in battle. Its name is Meryl. And it likes you...for now.

axe.name: Lollipop
axe.description: A sweet candy on a stick that's so hard, it just might work as a weapon. Raises chance of knockouts and cavities

axe.name: Battle Scythe
axe.description: An axe with an extremely sharp blade. Much bigger and sharper than a farming sickle.

axe.name: Basilisk Fang
axe.description: A weapon that can cut through anything as if it were cloth. Has a paralyzing effect.

axe.name: Devil Finger
axe.description: A weapon that leaves scars said to resemble scratches from the devil's nails. Has the power to absorb life.

axe.name: Cheap Axe
axe.description: An old, rusty axe. Too old to be charged.

axe.name: Chopping Axe
axe.description: A sturdy bronze axe. Can be charged to cover wider areas.

axe.name: Lumber Axe
axe.description: A nice, strong silver axe. Can be charged to cover wider areas.

axe.name: Mountain Axe
axe.description: An axe like an ox. Made from gold and can be charged to cover wider areas.

axe.name: Miracle Axe
axe.description: An ax so amazing, poems are written of its noble deeds. Shorter time needed to charge, making it highly efficient.

staff.name: Rod
staff.description: A staff with magical power. Designed for sorcery, so it reduces RP spent when using magic.

staff.name: Staff
staff.description: A simple, magical staff. Try it out and see what you can do with it!

staff.name: Silver Staff
staff.description: A staff made with sacred silver gems. Improves concentration, making it ideal for students.

staff.name: Flare Staff
staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of fire. The head is very hot and tends to spark a lot. Hey, that rhymes!

staff.name: Ice Staff
staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of water. The head is very cold and seems to emanate a faint breeze.

staff.name: Lightning Wand
staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic pwer of wind. Said to bring thunder and lightning.

staff.name: Earth Staff
staff.description: A staff imbued with the magic power of earth. Strong enough to shake the ground.

staff.name: Wizard's Staff
staff.description: Proof that the bearer is a full-fledged wizard. You can feel you intelligence grow just by holding it.

staff.name: Mage's Staff
staff.description: A staff that can be used as a walking stick. Popular among older wizards.

staff.name: Rune Staff
staff.description: A staff used by great wizards. Its magical power can be boosted by writing runes in the air.

staff.name: Mage's Staff+
staff.description: A mage's staff strengthened with magic power. Not only more powerful, but easier to use as well.

staff.name: Magic Broom
staff.description: A staff that long ago belonged to a witch. You can use it to fly around in classic witchy style.

staff.name: Basket
staff.description: A basket that fits more than you'd think. Be careful not to leave things inside when fighting or they might spill!

staff.name: Magic Shot
staff.description: A trumpet-shaped syringe. Makes mysterious sloshy sounds. Getting pierced with it would hurt a lot.

staff.name: Hell Branch
staff.description: A staff made from a netherworld branch. There's rumors that the kid who invented this was scolded by his parents.

staff.name: Crimson Staff
staff.description: A blood-colored staff. And no, it wasn't painted with real blood. It's just dye made from insects.

staff.name: Bubble Staff
staff.description: A staff that produces millions of bubbles. It must be popular among children. Don't be so mean. Lend it to them.

staff.name: Gaia Rod
staff.description: A staff that has the power of the earth. It gets power from the Forest of Beginnings secretly.

staff.name: Shooting Star Staff
staff.description: A staff inspired by speeding stars in the sky. Sadly, your speed will not become twice as fast.

staff.name: Cyclone Rod
staff.description: A staff that has the power of the wind. It produces high suction power which is used as a cleaning tool in another world.

staff.name: Storm Wand
staff.description: A staff that is believed to be able to call storms. If it really does, it's gonna be a problem. Please don't try it.

staff.name: Ruby Rod
staff.description: A passionate staff that shines bright red. No one can stop the feelings gushing out from this weapon.

staff.name: Emerald Rod
staff.description: Bright green is a symbol of calmness. This rod makes you look intelligent and cool.

staff.name: Sapphire Rod
staff.description: A very cute rod. This is the best for those who care about the beauty of their hair.

staff.name: Amethyst Rod
staff.description: A staff decorated with purple amethysts. Many of the wizards who have this rod are attractive mature people.

staff.name: Aquamarine Rod
staff.description: A staff decorated with an ocean blue stone.

staff.name: Diamond Rod
staff.description: Although it's the king of jewels, the only thing people care about is its hardness. And it IS very hard.

staff.name: Friendly Rod
staff.description: A staff of friendship. "We should be good friends" means she doesn't want to date you.

staff.name: Love-Love Rod
staff.description: A staff of love. Among wizard couples, it's secretly popular to equip it together.

staff.name: Sorcerer's Wand
staff.description: An almighty staff. But a true sorcerer knows he actually knows nothing.

staff.name: Hell Curse
staff.description: A staff that is believed to be created in a hellish pot. by the way, the udon cooked in that pot tastes amazing.

staff.name: Algernon
staff.description: A staff of flowers given to someone. For some reason, handling it makes you feel extra sharp.

staff.name: Golden Turnip Staff
staff.description: A staff in the shape of a Golden Turnip. When you drop it in a fountain, just be honest and say you dropped a gold staff.

staff.name: Sweet Potato Staff
staff.description: One autumn day, someone poked a roasted sweet potato with a broom. That's how this staff was created.

staff.name: Elvish Harp
staff.description: A beautiful and well-made harp. Created by famous Elvish craftsmen. You can play, sing, and hit enemies with it.

staff.name: Syringe
staff.description: A staff that is a fusion of treatment and injury made by a mad magic doctor. Not recommended for hospitals.

dualBlade.name: Short Dagger
dualBlade.description: Hold one in each hand to overwhelm your foes.

dualBlade.name: Steel Edge
dualBlade.description: Weapon made with sharpened iron. Heavy, and requires considerable skill to wield.

dualBlade.name: Wind Edge
dualBlade.description: Two roaring swords that create winds capable of slicing through enemies.

dualBlade.name: Frost Edge
dualBlade.description: Two swords emanating cool air. Not for people who are overly sensitive to the cold.

dualBlade.name: Steel Katana
dualBlade.description: Solid swords reinforced with high heat. So sharp that they can cut steel.

dualBlade.name: Sonic Dagger
dualBlade.description: Slim wind-elemental dual blades that move at sonic speed. You can hear the air itself being cut in two.

dualBlade.name: Salamander
dualBlade.description: Dual blades set ablaze. Be careful you don't get burned, 'cause these swords are hot, hot, hot!

dualBlade.name: Twin Blade
dualBlade.description: Dual blades that can make you as strong as an ogre. The long blades help extend your reach. Also has a poisoning effect.

dualBlade.name: Rampage
dualBlade.description: Called "Rampage" due to their fiery power and the violence they instill in their bearer.

dualBlade.name: Platinum Edge
dualBlade.description: Dual blades made of pure platinum. Very sharp and durable.

dualBlade.name: Efreet
dualBlade.description: High-heat dual blades that generate heat waves. Legend says they once caused an entire sea to evaporate.

dualBlade.name: Deep Blizzard
dualBlade.description: Dual blades so called that all water around them freezes on contact. As such, its blades tend to change shape a lot.

dualBlade.name: Dark Invitation
dualBlade.description: Magical soul-eating swords. They can end the lives of their targets in a single instant.

dualBlade.name: Force Divide
dualBlade.description: Dual blades imbued with both fire and water energies. the temperature difference increases the damage dealt.

dualBlade.name: Dragoon Claw
dualBlade.description: Dual blades in the shape of three dragon heads. The three on the left blade stop the other three from fighting.

dualBlade.name: Heart Fire
dualBlade.description: Dual blades as hot as the sun. Their fire is said to turn everything to ash.

dualBlade.name: Desert Wind
dualBlade.description: Dual blades designs inspired by desert winds. Popular for their beauty and strength.

dualBlade.name: Broken Wall
dualBlade.description: Dual blades imbued with earth power. So hard that they can smash rocks to pieces.

dualBlade.name: Orcus Sword
dualBlade.description: These long blades allow for a number of attacks to be made from a distance.

dualBlade.name: Chaos Edge
dualBlade.description: Dual blades imbued with magical power. Has a paralyzing effect.

dualBlade.name: Rune Edge
dualBlade.description: Dual blade imbued with runic power. Those lucky enough to see them in action may have their dreams come true.

dualBlade.name: Iron Edge
dualBlade.description: Reinforced dual blades. Heavy but well-balanced, making them easy to wield.

dualBlade.name: Emerald Edge
dualBlade.description: Dual blades reinforced countless times.the increase to their magic power gives them a green tint.

dualBlade.name: Thief Knife
dualBlade.description: Dual blades often used by pirates and thieves. Holding them somehow makes you feel more inherently aggressive.

dualBlade.name: Double Scratch
dualBlade.description: Dual blades used to soothe itchy backs With two at your disposal, your whole back is covered!

dualBlade.name: Priest Saber
dualBlade.description: Dual blades used by priests for protection. They're quite powerful, and guaranteed to keep anyone safely preaching.

dualBlade.name: Earnest Edge
dualBlade.description: In the hands of an expert, these long blades can win a fight without taking a hit.

dualBlade.name: Gorgeous Lx
dualBlade.description: Gorgeous duel blades. Not only one, but two of them. They're gorgeous, and you can be too, by wielding them.

dualBlade.name: Acutorimass
dualBlade.description: Cooking ladles reinforced as weapons. For some reason there are two.

dualBlade.name: Twin Leeks
dualBlade.description: Leeks. Yes, leeks. Wielding them makes you feel like singing polka.

dualBlade.name: Twin Justice
dualBlade.description: Justice now comes in two. Twice the justice, twice the power. Mete it upon your foes for...Uh...great justice!

tools.name: Cheap Hoe
tools.description: An old, rusty hoe. You can till the fields with it. Its blade is chipped.

tools.name: Sturdy Hoe
tools.description: A slightly stronger how. No longer chipped by rocks. Charge to cover a wider area.

tools.name: Seasoned Hoe
tools.description: A stronger hoe. Covers an even wider area when charged than the Sturdy Hoe.

tools.name: Shiny Hoe
tools.description: A hoe that glimmers like the sweat on your brow. Covers a very wide area when charged.

tools.name: Blessed Hoe
tools.description: A hoe so strong that the soil is all like, thank you, may I have another? Really wide coverage when charged.

tools.name: Cheap Waterpot
tools.description: An old, rusted waterpot. You can water the fields with it. Press the B button repeatedly to water as you walk.

tools.name: Tin Waterpot
tools.description: A tin waterpot. Tough heavy, it can be charged to water the field.

tools.name: Lion Waterpot
tools.description: A super-cool waterpot. So cool that it can cover wider areas than most.

tools.name: Rainbow Waterpot
tools.description: A colorful waterpot. So colorful that it can cover wider areas than most. It wishes to be the prettiest waterpot at the dance.

tools.name: Joy Waterpot
tools.description: A lovely waterpot. So lovely that its water strikes the field as if tears from an omnibenevolent deity above.

tools.name: Cheap Sickle
tools.description: An old, rusty sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

tools.name: Iron Sickle
tools.description: A fairly sharp sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

tools.name: Quality Sickle
tools.description: A high-quality sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

tools.name: Super Sickle
tools.description: An outstanding sickle. Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

tools.name: Legendary Sickle
tools.description: This sickle is sick...le! Use it to cut weeds and plants. You can also cut crops to collect seeds.

tools.name: Cheap Pole
tools.description: An old, rusty fishing pole. So old that it might break of the fish it too large.

tools.name: Beginner's Pole
tools.description: A pole for beginners. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

tools.name: Skilled Pole
tools.description: A pole for novice fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

tools.name: Famous Pole
tools.description: A pole for master fishers. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

tools.name: Sacred Pole
tools.description: A pole so strong that it'll never break. Can be charged to attract fish from far away.

tools.name: Brush
tools.description: An item used to brush monsters. Capable of grooming just about anything!

tools.name: Clippers
tools.description: An item used to trim and clip Wooly fur. Designed not to hurt its target.

tools.name: Magnifying Glass
tools.description: An item used to check soil quality. Equip and examine fields to learn more about your crops.

shield.name: Small Shield
shield.description: A small shield, easy to use. Low defense capability.

shield.name: Iron Shield
shield.description: A simple shield made from iron. Wide, so it stops attacks fairly easily.

shield.name: Round Shield
shield.description: A rounded shield. Used to fend off attacks rather than simply deflecting them.

shield.name: Platinum Shield
shield.description: A durable shield made of pure platinum. Greatly resists critical hits.

shield.name: Heavy Shield
shield.description: A shield made from layers of silver. Big and tough, it has a high chance of resisting critical hits.

shield.name: Knight Shield
shield.description: Proof of bravery, only borne by a chosen few. Has a very high chance of resisting critical hits.

shield.name: Rune Shield
shield.description: A shield made with runes. Not easily damaged, and blocks magic attacks. Halves light and darkness magic.

shield.name: Magic Shield
shield.description: A shield that blocks magic attacks and seals. Best used together with a staff.

shield.name: Prism Shield
shield.description: A shield that fends off magic attacks. Reduces damage by diffusing magical power. Blocks seals.

shield.name: Element Shield
shield.description: A shield that raises defense against elemental attacks. Lighter than it looks and very easy to use.

shield.name: Chaos Shield
shield.description: A shield that goes with the chaos blade. Highly resistant to poison, paralysis and seals.

shield.name: Turtle Shield
shield.description: A shield made by combining turtle shells. Very heavy, and often used in training. Resists being blown away.

shield.name: Bone Shield
shield.description: A shield that's both light and hard. Its featherweight nature makes it easy to handle.

shield.name: Kite Shield
shield.description: A shield with high defensive power. Simply shaped, easy to use and highly resistant to knockouts.

shield.name: Magical Shield
shield.description: High in magic defense and resists status ailments. The crystal in its center reduces magic attacks.

shield.name: Monkey Plush
shield.description: A cute stuffed animal. Sold out in stores due to how terrifyingly cuddly it is.

shield.name: Umbrella
shield.description: An expensive umbrella. Mainly meant for use as a parasol, but works against rain, too!

shield.name: Magic Plant Shield
shield.description: A shield from a magic plant. The better you take care of it, the stronger it will be.

headgear.name: Silver Hairpin
headgear.description: A traditional craft item from the Far East. Worn on the head to ward off evil spirits.

headgear.name: Gold Hairpin
headgear.description: A traditional craft item from the Far East. Made of finest gold.

headgear.name: Fancy Hat
headgear.description: A striking red hat. Breathes quite well, offering superior cranial comfort.

headgear.name: Headband
headgear.description: A headband from the Far East. Tie it around your forehead when you want to feel awesome.

headgear.name: Feathered Hat
headgear.description: A hat with feathers in it. Protects your head and makes you look like an intellectual. Also increases love.

headgear.name: Brand Glasses
headgear.description: A famous designer's brand. Makes you look stylish!

headgear.name: Spectacles
headgear.description: People say you look smart with these.

headgear.name: Intelligent Glasses
headgear.description: You look rather more silly than smart in these.

headgear.name: Straw Hat
headgear.description: A hat great for summer. It feels good because it lets the heat out.

headgear.name: Fireproof Hood
headgear.description: Protects your head. Don't push. Don't run. Don't talk. Just stop, drop...and roooooll...

headgear.name: Cute Knitting
headgear.description: A warm, woolen hat.

headgear.name: Black Ribbon
headgear.description: A black-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look intimidating.

headgear.name: Orange Ribbon
headgear.description: An orange-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look fun to hang out with.

headgear.name: Red Ribbon
headgear.description: A red-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look passionate.

headgear.name: Yellow Ribbon
headgear.description: A yellow-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look intelligent.

headgear.name: Blue Ribbon
headgear.description: A blue-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look loyal.

headgear.name: Green Ribbon
headgear.description: A green-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look environmentally conscious. Possible hipster.

headgear.name: Purple Ribbon
headgear.description: A purple-colored ribbon. Those who wear it look sort of gothic.

headgear.name: Indigo Ribbon
headgear.description: An indigo-colored ribbon. Those who wear it looks regal.

headgear.name: White Ribbon
headgear.description: A white-colored ribbon. Those who wear it should probably avoid eating spaghetti.

headgear.name: Turnip Headgear
headgear.description: A hat made from a turnip. It was once used during Halloween, but it got replaced by a pumpkin.

headgear.name: Pumpkin Headgear
headgear.description: A hat made from a pumpkin. The hero of Halloween.

headgear.name: Spring Headdress
headgear.description: A headdress that makes you feel spring-y. People who love spring have pure hearts.

headgear.name: Summer Headdress
headgear.description: A headdress that makes you feel summer-y. People who love summer have strong hearts.

headgear.name: Autumn Headdress
headgear.description: A headdress that makes you feel autumn-y. People who love autumn have merciful hearts.

headgear.name: Winter Headdress
headgear.description: A headdress that makes you feel winter-y. People who love winter have open hearts.

headgear.name: Lolita Headdress
headgear.description: Gothic Lolita fashion that is popular among some people.

headgear.name: Headdress
headgear.description: An accessory that decorates your head. It must be frilly and flashy.

headgear.name: Cat Ears
headgear.description: An accessory inspired by a Palm Cat's ears.

headgear.name: Crown
headgear.description: A classy crown that kings wear.

headgear.name: Four Seasons
headgear.description: A headdress that makes you feel all seasons. It's for those who have pure, strong, merciful, and open hearts.

headgear.name: Silk Hat
headgear.description: When you wear this, you might hear a song. No tricks, no gimmicks!

shoes.name: Feather Boots
shoes.description: Boots made of light material. Makes you feel like you're walking on air!

shoes.name: Heavy Boots
shoes.description: Boots made of steel. Keep you from blowing away, but you'll get tired more easily.

shoes.name: Leather Boots
shoes.description: Leather boots made for travelers. Tough and durable.

shoes.name: Knight Boots
shoes.description: Boots with very high defense. Fine quality. Often worn by knights.

shoes.name: Snow Boots
shoes.description: Special boots originally created for wear in snowy regions. They stop you from slipping in any weather!

shoes.name: Ice Skates
shoes.description: Boots that make you skate around like you're in a rink, anywhere you go. They don't let you jump or spin though.

shoes.name: Piyo Sandals
shoes.description: Shoes that chirp with every step. They make you want to run around just to see how loud they can get.

shoes.name: Step-In Boots
shoes.description: Boots designed to prevent you from executing dash attacks.

shoes.name: Ghost Boots
shoes.description: Boots designed to lessen one's weight through principles learned from flying foes. Increases travel speed.

shoes.name: Iron Geta
shoes.description: Simple iron footwear. Made for training purposes. Decreases travel speed.

shoes.name: Strider Boots
shoes.description: Boots that help you take bigger steps. Lengthens your invincibility when dashing.

shoes.name: Secret Shoes
shoes.description: Boots with secret heels that make you look taller.

shoes.name: Wet Boots
shoes.description: Boots that are wet and slippery. Their natural power helps you land critical hits.

shoes.name: Sneaking Boots
shoes.description: Boots used to sneak up on unsuspecting foes unnoticed. Allows you to attack monsters before they attack you!

shoes.name: Fast Step Boots
shoes.description: Boots designed for dance practice. Puts a spring in their wearer's step.

shoes.name: Water Shoes
shoes.description: Footwear used by Ninja of the Far East. Helps you walk on water.

shoes.name: Rocket Wing
shoes.description: Boots that help you walk faster than ever before. Takes your breath away, so make sure not to pass out!

shoes.name: Silver Boots
shoes.description: Simple silver boots. Wearing them increases defense.

shoes.name: Gold Boots
shoes.description: Simple golden boots. Wearing them increases defense.

shoes.name: Bone Boots
shoes.description: Boots made with a combination of hard bones. Through they may look primitive, they're high in defense.

shoes.name: Fairy Boots
shoes.description: Rare boots made with fairy dust. Very light, but "fairy" tough.

shoes.name: Free Farming Shoes
shoes.description: Shoes for advanced farmers that make it possible to cultivate regardless of the grid lines.

armor.name: Shirt
armor.description: A plain shirt to wear under clothes. It's made from materials which absorb sweat well.

armor.name: Vest
armor.description: Fancy clothing that keeps you warm. Also called a waistcoat.

armor.name: Wooly Shirt
armor.description: The puffy wool protects you from attacks. but it's soooooo annoying to wash.

armor.name: Cotton Cloth
armor.description: Might look like bandages, but they're not. Also not recommended as a chest wrap for women.

armor.name: Chain Mail
armor.description: With this, straw sandals and a ninja sword on your back, you're on your way to becomming a true warrior!

armor.name: Protector
armor.description: Equipment that prevents accidents before they happen.

armor.name: Wind Cloak
armor.description: A cloak imbued with the element of wind. Don't get any bright ideas and start jumping off of buildings, though.

armor.name: Sparkling Shirt
armor.description: This is the biggest challenge for people who love clothes. Wearing something like this...Are you out of mind?

armor.name: Platinum Mail
armor.description: A luxurious mail made of platinum.

armor.name: Lamellar Vest
armor.description: Armor made from plate-shaped scales. It doesn't impede your speed and also protects you well.

armor.name: Elvish Cloak
armor.description: A brilliant cloak that is absolutely perfect. Only the beautiful can wear this.

armor.name: Power Protector
armor.description:
A reinforced protector. It will prevent any accidents.
Disclaimer: Not to be used when cooking.

armor.name: Dragon Cloak
armor.description: A cloak with the symbol of a dragon. Anything with dragon on it is strong, right?

armor.name: Rune Vest
armor.description: A vest imbued with the power of runes,

armor.name: Royal Garter
armor.description: Makes you feel the dignity of the king.

armor.name: Four Dragons' Vest
armor.description: A vest blessed by Native Dragons. Can tolerate any attack.

accessory.name: Engagement Ring
accessory.description: Use it to propose to your #1 love. Be sure you also prepare a double bed! Well...after they say yes, anyway.

accessory.name: Dolphin Brooch
accessory.description: A lovely brooch made by a master craftsman, If one of your family equips it, enhances their status.

accessory.name: Strange Pendant
accessory.description: This creepy-looking pendant nullifies your defense and magic defense. So, uh, good luck with that.

accessory.name: Stay-up Ring
accessory.description: You will no longer yawn with this ring. Hail to short sleepers!

accessory.name: Throwing Ring
accessory.description: You can throw an item far away with this ring.

accessory.name: Anette's Necklace
accessory.description: With wearing this necklace, you can move faster. Also, you're kicking up more clouds of dirt. Stop that.

accessory.name: Magic Earrings
accessory.description: Earrings made from dazzling magic stones. Makes even the ugliest of earlobes look nice.

accessory.name: Witch Earrings
accessory.description: Small, jaggy earrings. Coordinate nicely with a broomstick and pointy hat.

accessory.name: Earrings
accessory.description: Dangly earrings. They're so cute when they bobble in the breeze.

accessory.name: Art of Magic
accessory.description: A book on secrets of spellcasting. Halves non-elemental attacks by way of magic walls.

accessory.name: Art of Defense
accessory.description: A book on the secrets of guarding. Halves time spent flinching, granting its reader a heart of steel.

accessory.name: Art of Attack
accessory.description: A book on the secrets of combat. Generates sonic waves and expands your weapon's target area.

accessory.name: Fluffy Scarf
accessory.description: A scarf made of soft cotton. Very warm. Cuts all RP consumption (with some exceptions).

accessory.name: Hand-Knit Scarf
accessory.description: A warm, woolen scarf. Halves RP consumption (with some exceptions).

accessory.name: Proof of Wisdom
accessory.description: Proof of almighty wisdom. Slowly recovers RP.

accessory.name: Hero's Proof
accessory.description: Proof of almighty power. Slowly recovers HP.

accessory.name: Courage Badge
accessory.description: Given to those of brave heart and courageous mind. Ain't it the truth!

accessory.name: Rosary
accessory.description: An accessory bearing a holy cross. Used for prayers. Prevents most monsters from appearing at all.

accessory.name: Shield Ring
accessory.description: A ring used as a shield. Through tough, it only covers a short range. Occasionally reduces damage received to 1.

accessory.name: Magic Charm
accessory.description: A must-have charm among magic knights. Favors either attack or magic attack -- whichever is stronger.

accessory.name: Power Gloves
accessory.description: Gloves that fit snugly on one's hands. Used to carry heavy things. they're so bad!

accessory.name: Badge
accessory.description: A vintage, collectible badge given out as a consolation prize.

accessory.name: Work Gloves
accessory.description: Protects your hands from blisters. A must-have for farming.

accessory.name: Gloves
accessory.description: Fine quality leather gloves. Their soft green color is attractive to girls.

accessory.name: Champ Belt
accessory.description: An honorary belt given to champions. Greatly increases maximum HP.

accessory.name: Talisman
accessory.description: A type of protective charm. Reverses status effects such as poison, paralysis, fatigue and cold.

accessory.name: Lucky Strike
accessory.description: Brings you good luck. Grants a higher than average chance of landing critical hits.

accessory.name: Leather Belt
accessory.description: An ordinary leather belt of the sort one can find almost anywhere. Raises defensive skills.

accessory.name: Charm
accessory.description: A charm from the Far East. Protects you from misfortune by blocking critical hits.

accessory.name: Holy Amulet
accessory.description: A charm that is said to protect one from danger.

accessory.name: Earth Pendant
accessory.description: A pendant inspired by earth. Its bounty boosts the effects of recovery items.

accessory.name: Dew Pendant
accessory.description: An outdoorsy pendant inspired by dew. Raises attack for farm tools.

accessory.name: Field Pendant
accessory.description: A pendant inspired by the wind. Its scent increases the ability of friendly monsters.

accessory.name: Sun Pendant
accessory.description: A sun-shaped pendant. Increases companions' abilities with its light.

accessory.name: Star Pendant
accessory.description: A star-shaped pendant that shines as a real heavenly body. Increases experience gain.

accessory.name: Heart Pendant
accessory.description: A cute heart-shaped pendant. Warms your heart and increases skill experience gained.

accessory.name: Silver Pendant
accessory.description: A silver pendant. Simple but elegant in design.

accessory.name: Ruby Brooch
accessory.description: A brooch shining with ruby-red light. When put under the sun, it glitters like a star.

accessory.name: Diamond Brooch
accessory.description: A golden brooch with scattered diamonds. enjoy its smooth lines and beautiful glimmer, Resists all status ailments.

accessory.name: Sapphire Brooch
accessory.description: A lovely pink-colored sapphire brooch with a shell motif.

accessory.name: Emerald Brooch
accessory.description: A beautiful emerald brooch with an airy sheen to it.

accessory.name: Amethyst Brooch
accessory.description: A brooch with a strangely soothing effect.

accessory.name: Aquamarine Brooch
accessory.description: A brooch in the color of the deepest sea.

accessory.name: Platinum Bracelet
accessory.description: A platinum bracelet. Greatly raises magic defense.

accessory.name: Gold Bracelet
accessory.description: A golden bracelet. Raises magic defense quite considerably.

accessory.name: Silver Bracelet
accessory.description: A silver bracelet. Raises magic defense.

accessory.name: Bronze Bracelet
accessory.description: A heavy, bronze bracelet. Raises magic defense for a little bit.

accessory.name: Cheap Bracelet
accessory.description: An old, rusty bracelet. Slightly raises magic defense.

accessory.name: Magic Ring
accessory.description: A ring imbued with magical power. Speeds up the time needed to charge.

accessory.name: Poison Ring
accessory.description: A ring that not only resists poison, but inflicts it upon foes as well due to the medicines set into its trim.

accessory.name: Paralysis Ring
accessory.description: A ring that not only resists paralysis, but inflicts it upon foes as well due to the medicines set into its trim.

accessory.name: Silent Ring
accessory.description: A ring that not only resists seals, but places them upon foes as well due to the medicines set in to its trim.

accessory.name: Critical Ring
accessory.description: A ring that raises your chance of landing critical hits. Just by wearing it, you'll know right where to attack.

accessory.name: Platinum Ring
accessory.description: Beloved for its simple design. This platinum type is rare and hard to find.

accessory.name: Gold Ring
accessory.description: Beloved for its simple design. More expensive than silver.

accessory.name: Silver Ring
accessory.description: Beloved for its simple design, but otherwise unremarkable.

accessory.name: Earth Ring
accessory.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of earth. It blocks earth damage, but makes you vulnerable to wind damage.

accessory.name: Water Ring
accessory.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of water. It blocks water damage, but makes you vulnerable to fire damage.

accessory.name: Wind Ring
accessory.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of wind. It blocks wind damage, but makes you vulnerable to earth damage.

accessory.name: Fire Ring
accessory.description: A ring imbued with the magical power of fire. It blocks fire damage, but makes you vulnerable to water damage.

accessory.name: Cursed Ring
accessory.description: A cursed ring with spikes that hurt your fingers.

accessory.name: Happy Ring
accessory.description: A ring that brings you happiness. Increases your chance of finding items.

accessory.name: Ruby Ring
accessory.description: A ring with a mysterious and alluring design.

accessory.name: Diamond Ring
accessory.description: A glittering ring. Protects against sleepiness, fatigue, illness and HP absorption.

accessory.name: Sapphire Ring
accessory.description: A ring with a beautiful shining inset sapphire.

accessory.name: Emerald Ring
accessory.description: The bright-shining emerald beautifully adorns your finger.

accessory.name: Amethyst Ring
accessory.description: The elegance of the amethyst brings a calmness to the atmosphere.

accessory.name: Aquamarine Ring
accessory.description: A roughly cut stone makes this ring quite attractive.

fish.name: Masu Trout
fish.description: One of the most common fish. Mostly found in rivers, but sometimes also found out at sea.

fish.name: Squid
fish.description: A mollusk that's active at night. Uses the fins on its body to swim like its flying in the water.

fish.name: Taimen
fish.description: The largest freshwater salmonid. Very rare and valued.

fish.name: Sardine
fish.description: A fairly easy fish to catch. Swims in shoals, and is often viewed as a beautiful, tasty delight.

fish.name: Char
fish.description: A fish people just love to catch. Prefers swimming in old water.

fish.name: Chub
fish.description: A fish with a dark line on its body. During spawning season, it developrs two more lines.

fish.name: Glitter Snapper
fish.description: A fish with a body of glittering silver. Very easy to spot, but hard to catch.

fish.name: Skipjack
fish.description: A fall fish that requires power and skill to catch.

fish.name: Turbot
fish.description: A fish with both eyes situated on the right side of its body. Changes color depending on its environment.

fish.name: Gibelio
fish.description: Displayers unique breeding characteristics due to females outnumbering the males. Found in quiet rivers.

fish.name: Salmon
fish.description: Spends most of its time in the ocean, but swims upstream to spawn in the river. Used in many recipes.

fish.name: Mackerel
fish.description: Spoils easily. Often grilled or boiled, and often for a long time in order to disguise that it has spoiled. Tsk tsk!

fish.name: Needlefish
fish.description: Swims near the water's surface with its tiny, thin body. Has an aqua-colored back and a white belly.

fish.name: Pike
fish.description: Named after its slim, long, and slender body. A popular fall fish that's full of nutrients.

fish.name: Sunsquid
fish.description: A squid from the tropics. Has a tanned body and swims in shallow water.

fish.name: Shrimp
fish.description: A type of crustacean with its body protected by a hard shell. Has 13 pairs of legs.

fish.name: Snapper
fish.description: A fish known to bring good luck. Has long been served in festivals and ceremonies.

fish.name: Throbby Snapper
fish.description: A rare type of snapper that's considered legendary among fishermen.

fish.name: Rainbow Trout
fish.description: A mid-sized fish that lives in rivers. Very poisonous. During spawning season, the males shine in rainbow colors.

fish.name: Flounder
fish.description: A fish with both eyes on the left side of its body. Has a larger mouth and sharper teeth than a Turbot.

fish.name: Blowfish
fish.description: Known as one of the most expensive fish. Filled with poison, requiring high skill to cook safely.

fish.name: Yellowtail
fish.description: A stock name given to numerous varieties of fish. All have large bodies and are renowned for bringing good luck.

fish.name: Crucian Carp
fish.description: Matures fast, and also lives long. Mostly eats plankton. Requires both skill and luck to catch.

fish.name: Tuna
fish.description: A large and tasty fish that's widely loved. Traded at high prices and generally found in deep waters.

fish.name: Girella
fish.description: A winter fish caught in the ocean. Easy to find, but renowned for its powerful pull.

fish.name: Fall Flounder
fish.description: A fish that looks like fallen leaves. When seen swimming, you'd like there's debris floating by.

fish.name: Cherry Salmon
fish.description: A small freshwater fish. Found in various places due to its popularity -- it's often "stocked".

fish.name: Lamp Squid
fish.description: A squid with a lamp-shaped body. The lamp holds poison with a sealing effect, so it must be cooked with caution.

fish.name: Lobster
fish.description: A giant shrimp with walking legs. Its two large front claws are used to threaten enemies.

fish.name: Pond Smelt
fish.description: Thin and small, but adaptive, with a large habitat. Most often found during ice fishing.

fish.name: Sand Flounder
fish.description: A unique fish that swims in the sand. Gets nutrition from small minerals, making its body firm and sandy.

fish.name: Rockfish
fish.description: A unique fish that swims in the sand. Has a hard head that can crush even rocks.

collectible.name: Scrap Metal
collectible.description: Has limited use, and thus sees limited shipments.

collectible.name: Fodder
collectible.description: Feed for monsters. nutritious and sweet. Generally well-liked.

collectible.name: Warrior's Proof
collectible.description: A proof handed down among warrior tribes. Awarded by chiefs when a warrior attains manhood.

collectible.name: Raccoon Leaf
collectible.description: A magical leaf used by wily raccoons. Very handy tool that aids in transformation. Improves weapon's range.

collectible.name: Cursed Doll
collectible.description: It's scary. Very scary. By the way, who's standing behind you?

collectible.name: Rafflesia Petal
collectible.description: A petal from a rafflesia. It makes a really fancy fan.

collectible.name: Invisible Stone
collectible.description: A stone that is invisible. Difficult to find for obvious reasons. It's classified as a monster in a country to the east.

collectible.name: Shade Stone
collectible.description: A rare stone that absorbs all surrounding light. Often used to blot out the world when darkness is preferred.

collectible.name: Double Steel
collectible.description: Special steel that doubles the effect of the material used to previously reinforce an item.

collectible.name: 10-Fold Steel
collectible.description: The rarest steel among Double Steels. Multiples the effect of the material used to previously reinforce an item.

collectible.name: Glitta Augite
collectible.description: A strange stone produced by a tree. Emits strong light. If used for reinforcing a weapon, extends the range.

collectible.name: Light Ore
collectible.description: A highly rare ore that can be used to change a weapon's category.

collectible.name: Proof of Rank
collectible.description: Proof that you are in a high position. If you lose it...well, it's over.

collectible.name: Big Bird's Comb
collectible.description: A big cock's comb. When you get mad, just try to "comb" down.

collectible.name: Icy Nose
collectible.description: A sculpture in the shape of a Crystal Mammoth's trunk. Mammoths love to carry it around.

collectible.name: White Stone
collectible.description: There's a legend that women who were asked to marry while being presented with this stone lived happily ever after.

collectible.name: Throne of the Empire
collectible.description: A picture of the emperor. It goes for a high price in the Sechs Empire.

collectible.name: Rune Sphere Shard
collectible.description: A shard made from an enormous amount of crystallized runes. Although just a piece, it has a lot of power.

collectibleFurs.name: Quality Fur
collectibleFurs.description: Warm, soft and shiny fur. Raises resistance to knockouts when used in upgrades.

collectibleFurs.name: Wooly Furball
collectibleFurs.description: Fur dropped by a Wooly. Inconceivably soft.

collectibleFurs.name: Lightning Mane
collectibleFurs.description: A mane crackling with electricity. It'll shock you if you touch it.
