collectibleFurs.name: Quality Puffy Fur
collectibleFurs.description: Really puffy fur. Like, the puffiest of puff. It's really puffy for sure!

collectibleFurs.name: Yellow Down
collectibleFurs.description: Soft, feathery duck down. Looks outstanding.

collectibleFurs.name: Penguin Down
collectibleFurs.description: Down from an emperor penguin. "Emperor" is not their title, but their name.

collectibleFurs.name: Red Lion Fur
collectibleFurs.description: Beautiful red lion fur. The burning red color symbolizes strength.

collectibleFurs.name: Blue Lion Fur
collectibleFurs.description: Beautiful blue lion fur. The sparkling coat and dark blue hue symbolize wisdom.

collectibleFurs.name: Chest Hair
collectibleFurs.description: A Greater Demon's wild chest hair. So masculine!

collectibleMinerals.name: Scrap Metal+
collectibleMinerals.description: A super-duper awesomely spectacular piece of scrap metal that's super-duper useless to most people.

collectibleMinerals.name: Iron
collectibleMinerals.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Found everywhere.

collectibleMinerals.name: Bronze
collectibleMinerals.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Pretty common.

collectibleMinerals.name: Silver
collectibleMinerals.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Valuable and highly sought after.

collectibleMinerals.name: Gold
collectibleMinerals.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Valuable and highly sought after.

collectibleMinerals.name: Platinum
collectibleMinerals.description: A type of mineral used in the forging of items and accessories. Extremely rare and hard to find

collectibleMinerals.name: Orichalcum
collectibleMinerals.description: A legendary ore used for making weapons or accessories.

collectibleMinerals.name: Dragonic Stone
collectibleMinerals.description: A mineral that was believed not to exist in reality.

collectibleJewels.name: Diamond
collectibleJewels.description: A very hard gem known as the 'King of Gemstones.' Symbolizes purity.

collectibleJewels.name: Ruby
collectibleJewels.description: A red-colored gem symbolizing passion. Those that cast star-shaped reflections are particularly valuable.

collectibleJewels.name: Emerald
collectibleJewels.description: A beautiful green-colored gem symbolizing happiness. Those that are clear and smooth are the most valuable.

collectibleJewels.name: Sapphire
collectibleJewels.description: A gem that comes in different colors such as pink, blue, yellow and green. Symbolizes love.

collectibleJewels.name: Amethyst
collectibleJewels.description: A gem long known for its mysterious energy. Symbolizes peace of mind.

collectibleJewels.name: Aquamarine
collectibleJewels.description: A gem as blue as the deep sea. Symbolizes calmness.

collectibleJewels.name: Green Core
collectibleJewels.description: A green crystal with magic power. Makes you more kindly for some reason.

collectibleJewels.name: Red Core
collectibleJewels.description: A green crystal with magic power. Makes you energetic.

collectibleJewels.name: Yellow Core
collectibleJewels.description: A yellow crystal suffused with magic power. Makes you feel cheerful.

collectibleJewels.name: Blue Core
collectibleJewels.description: A blue crystal that has magic power. Makes you feel calm

collectibleJewels.name: Crystal Skull
collectibleJewels.description: A crystal in the shape of a skull. Those who love jewels and hate ghosts will be upset by this.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Cheap Cloth
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: A poor-quality swatch of cloth. Unstitches when you so much as breathe on it.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Quality Cloth
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: A cloth of fine quality. Its fabric is tough and not easily torn.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Silk Cloth
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: A smooth, silky cloth. Go ahead and rub your face in it. Doesn't it feel nice?

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Giant's Glove
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: Gloves worn by giants. Tough material that doesn't tear easily.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Blue Giant's Glove
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: A glove used by a Blue giant. Almost impossible to tear apart. Why you would even try, I have no idea.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Insect Carapace
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: The carapace of an insect. Light but tough.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Pretty Carapace
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: The carapace of an insect. Dappled and beautiful.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Ghost Hood
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: A hood that covers the head. Special material with spooky powers.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Quality Worn Cloth
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: Used to be high-quality cloth, but it's worn out from overuse.

collectibleClothsAndSkins.name: Ancient Orc Cloth
collectibleClothsAndSkins.description: An orc's cloth that is described as legendary cloth sometimes. But a cloth is a cloth, and an orc is an orc.

collectibleShards.name: Arrowhead
collectibleShards.description: Rusty and useless as-is, but might shine if polished. Kind of like humanity...

collectibleShards.name: Shoulder Piece
collectibleShards.description: Rough, wooden shoulder piece. Not terribly exciting.

collectibleShards.name: Hammer Piece
collectibleShards.description: A piece of broken hammer. Gotta be useful for something, right?

collectibleShards.name: Broken Hilt
collectibleShards.description: A broken piece of hilt. Fits nicely in the hand.

collectibleShards.name: Broken Box
collectibleShards.description: An old wooden box. Get inside and pretend its a spaceship!

collectibleShards.name: Left Rock Shard
collectibleShards.description: A shard that Sano gave you as a favor. You didn't take it away by force, right?!

collectibleShards.name: Right Rock Shard
collectibleShards.description: A shard that Uno gave you as a favor. You didn't take it away by force, right?!

collectibleShards.name: MTGU Plate
collectibleShards.description: A plate created through science."MTGU" stands for Miserable Trash Garbage Useless. See? Even the name is poorly designed.

collectibleShards.name: Shiny Screw
collectibleShards.description: A screw from something. People get upset if they find a screw left after making something.

collectibleShards.name: Glistening Blade
collectibleShards.description: A blade of a scythe. It's glistening.

collectibleShards.name: Pirate's Armor
collectibleShards.description: A shoulder guard made of steel.

collectibleShards.name: Great Hammer Shard
collectibleShards.description: A shard of a broken hammer that used to be a legendary weapon.

collectibleShards.name: Blade Shard
collectibleShards.description: A small piece of a blade from a knife or something. Don't touch it with your bare hands.

collectibleShards.name: Broken Ice Wall
collectibleShards.description: A piece of Death Wall that's still conscious. Might try to creep up on you sometimes.

collectibleLiquids.name: Glue
collectibleLiquids.description: An adhesive made from boiled animal skin. Teacher will get mad if she catches you eating it.

collectibleLiquids.name: Devil Blood
collectibleLiquids.description: Life's blood collected from demons. Valued as medicine.

collectibleLiquids.name: Paralysis Poison
collectibleLiquids.description: Toxic liquid that can paralyze you or poison you, depending on your luck. Or lack of luck.

collectibleLiquids.name: Poison King
collectibleLiquids.description: Liquid that is very toxic. Just one lick is fatal. So stop licking it!

collectibleStrings.name: Old Bandage
collectibleStrings.description: Tattered bandage that's basically falling apart. Kind of grody.

collectibleStrings.name: Spider's Thread
collectibleStrings.description: An elastic string that's hard to break. Comes from a spider's butt.

collectibleStrings.name: Pretty Thread
collectibleStrings.description: A shiny thread commonly used to make fabric. Comes from a spider's butt.

collectibleStrings.name: Scorpion Tail
collectibleStrings.description: A highly poisonous scorpion tail. Handle with care!

collectibleStrings.name: Strong Vine
collectibleStrings.description: A long, thin, strong vine. Can be wrapped and banded.

collectibleStrings.name: Ambrosia's Thorns
collectibleStrings.description: Thorns that protect Ambrosia's chrysalis. All beautiful roses have sharp thorns.

collectibleStrings.name: Puppetry Strings
collectibleStrings.description: Strings that were controlling Marionetta. Not the thread of a spider you saved.

collectibleStrings.name: Vine
collectibleStrings.description: A long, thin vine hat can be used to tie down, wind about, and otherwise constrict things.

collectibleStrings.name: ChimeraTail
collectibleStrings.description: A Chimera's snake-like tail. Has a mind of its own.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Gunpowder
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Gunpowder for fire arrows. Explosive and dangerous. Handle with care.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Magic Powder
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Magically-infused powder. Water-soluble and has many uses.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Root
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Tree root used in crafting. Can be used in weapons or ground into medicine.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Spore
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A mushroom spore. Could it be an ancient menace from outer space?!

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Poison Powder
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Poisonous powder used to add poison to weapons and equipment. Leon might like it. Weirdo.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Holy Spore
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A spore that is very rare. It is said the spore goes to Gandhara when it disperses.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Fairy Dust
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Fairy dust that sparkles at night.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Water Dragon Ash
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A mockery of a Water Dragon ended up like this.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Fire Dragon Ash
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A mockery of a Fire Dragon ended up like this.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Earth Dragon Ash
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A mockery of a Earth Dragon ended up like this.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Mysterious Powder
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A.k.a. Zombie Powder. It's veiled in mystery. Undead mystery.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Magic
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: An elixir with magic power. It's necessary for wizards.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Fairy Elixir
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: Secret fairy item. Fairies are considered full-fledged sprites when they have this.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Turnip's Miracle
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A mysterious item that is said to show the order of the world. The root of dreams.

collectiblePowdersAndSpores.name: Melody Bottle
collectiblePowdersAndSpores.description: A small bottle that contains a Siren's voice. Sings an intoxicating melody if opened.

collectibleCrystals.name: Earth Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized earth magic. Hard as a rock.

collectibleCrystals.name: Love Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized love that brings happiness. Generously lets you take your foes' HP when you attack.

collectibleCrystals.name: Magic Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized magic. Often dissolved before use.

collectibleCrystals.name: Wind Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized wind magic. Constantly cushioned in fierce, ravaging winds.

collectibleCrystals.name: Water Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized water magic. Easily broken, so must be handled with care.

collectibleCrystals.name: Fire Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized fire magic. Extremely hot. Must not be touched with bare hands.

collectibleCrystals.name: Small Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Runes that have crystallized over the years. Very rare.

collectibleCrystals.name: Dark Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Crystallized darkness magic. Turns everything light to dark.

collectibleCrystals.name: Electro Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: An electrified crystal found within a Bane Dragon. Don't hold it with your bare hands!

collectibleCrystals.name: Big Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: A big crystal made of something that's been mixed together. It is said that it's made up of people's thoughts.

collectibleCrystals.name: Rune Crystal
collectibleCrystals.description: Runes that crystallized naturally. Feels warm somehow.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Big Giant's Nail
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A huge fingernail from big giants. Even grosser!

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Insect Jaw
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A monster jaw strong enough to chew just about anything.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Scorpion Pincer
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: Pincers that can easily cut through branches. They hurt, like, sooo much.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Dragon Fang
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A hard fang strong enough to leave tooth marks on iron.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Wolf Fang
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A sharp fang that can instantly kill prey with a single bite.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Gold Wolf Fang
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A sharp fang that glitters. It takes any prey down with one bite.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Cheap Propeller
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A cheap-looking propeller used as a weapon. Being poor is not sad, but this is sad.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Quality Propeller
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A well-made propeller used as a weapon. It's obvious that the company had lots of assets when they made this.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Malm Claw
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: It's sharp. It hurts. Also, it's blue.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Ivory Tusk
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: The discarded tusk of an elephant. Beautiful and easy to work. It's shed and regrown.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Unbroken Ivory Tusk
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: The discarded tusk of a mammoth. It doesn't break, but it sheds and regrows. Even if 100 people step on it, it won't break.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Magic Claw
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A sharp claw with magic power. It's the best to equip it with an animal suit.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Queen's Jaw
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A jaw that chews everything up except for diamonds. Diamonds are forever!

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Dangerous Scissors
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: Scissors that look dangerous. But dangerous means sexy, some people say. Just don't run with them

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Chimera's Claw
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: A claw of a Chimera. It looks amazing enough to be called the claw of a king.

collectibleClawsAndFangs.name: Wind Dragon Tooth
collectibleClawsAndFangs.description: According to Venti, she can grow new teeth by using her magic power, but since it's tiring, she hates to do it.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Devil Horn
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A horn of a demon. Filled with magical power.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Rigid Horn
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A jagged and dappled horn. Looks dangerous.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Bull's Horn
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A sharp and dangerous horn. Worth a lot if its unscratched.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Plant Stem
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: Strong and thick plant stem used for various purposes.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Stick
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A thin stick that can be used for materials. You could poke things with it too, I guess.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Insect Horn
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A jagged insect horn that has a patchy pattern.

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Thick Stick
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A thick stick that can be used for materials, but is not a substitute for lumber. At least you can smack people upside the head with it and laugh!

collectibleSticksAndStems.name: Moving Branch
collectibleSticksAndStems.description: A creepy branch that twitches. Strong in vitality, cutting it only makes it grow.

collectibleFeathers.name: Bird's Feather
collectibleFeathers.description: A soft feather that's prickly at the base and pointy on one end.

collectibleFeathers.name: Yellow Feather
collectibleFeathers.description: A soft-textured yellow feather. It's believed to bring happiness.

collectibleFeathers.name: Black Bird Feather
collectibleFeathers.description: A soft black feather. The quill is rather sharp.

collectibleFeathers.name: Thunderbird Feather
collectibleFeathers.description: A soft-textured feather that contains electricity.

collectibleFeathers.name: Dragon Fin
collectibleFeathers.description: The fin of a legendary dragon. A perfect material that's hard, supple and lightweight.

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Fish Fossil
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: An ancient fish fossil. Some collectors would kill to find one!

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Turtle Shell
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: A hard turtle shell. Good when you want to make something hard. (Hey, get your mind out of the gutter!)

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Skull
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: A creepy skull. Some people love this kind of stuff, though.

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Dragon Bones
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: Ancient dragon bones. Old, but still quite tough. Used for numerous purposes.

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Blk. Tortoise Shell
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: A shell that is extremely hard. You need to be skilled enough to work on this.

collectibleShellsAndBones.name: Ammonite
collectibleShellsAndBones.description: Octopirate's ancient friend. Used to endure hardships, but not resistant magic.

collectibleScales.name: Dragon Scale
collectibleScales.description: One of many scales that cover a dragon's body. Diamond hard, and also effective as a charm.

collectibleScales.name: Black Scale
collectibleScales.description: A dragon's scale. You feel darkness emanating from it.

collectibleScales.name: Blue Scale
collectibleScales.description: An ocean-blue dragon's scale. It makes you feel intelligent just holding it.

collectibleScales.name: Glitter Scale
collectibleScales.description: It glitters and shines. Mesmerizing. Like tinfoil.

collectibleScales.name: Crimson Scale
collectibleScales.description: A dragon scale the color of flames.

collectibleScales.name: Love Scale
collectibleScales.description: A scale that is famous as a love charm. But only few people have ever seen it because of its rarity.

collectibleScales.name: Grimoire Scale
collectibleScales.description: A scale of the legendary Grimoire. Nobody has ever possessed one. Until now!

collectibleScales.name: Legendary Scale
collectibleScales.description: A scale from a legendary fish in the lake. Greatly absorbs HP when used in upgrades.

collectibleScales.name: Earthwyrm Scale
collectibleScales.description: A scale from a legendary earth dragon. Incredibly hard and unable to be scratched.

collectibleScales.name: Firewyrm Scale
collectibleScales.description: A scale from a legendary fire dragon. Strong enough to endure even volcanic eruptions.

collectibleStones.name: Round Stone
collectibleStones.description: turned around after years of polishing under a waterfall.

collectibleStones.name: Tiny Golem Stone
collectibleStones.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The mark is so minuscule, the one who wrote it must be a craftsman.

collectibleStones.name: Golem Stone
collectibleStones.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The mark might just come off if you rub it.

collectibleStones.name: Golem Spirit Stone
collectibleStones.description: A stone with a mark to activate a Golem. The spirit is unchanging forever.

collectibleStones.name: Golem Tablet
collectibleStones.description: A tablet that was once a part of a Golem's body. It has '_METH' written on it, and serves as a source of power.

collectibleStones.name: Tablet of Truth
collectibleStones.description: A tablet that was once part of a Golem's body. It has 'EMETH' written on it, and serves as a source of power.

trash.name: Boot
trash.description: An old boot that was found floating in the water. Worn-out and useless.

trash.name: Can
trash.description: An empty can that someone tossed aside. Don't follow suit -- Littering is bad!

trash.name: Rare Can
trash.description: A rare can that's no longer manufactured. Worth a lot among collectors.

magic.name: Fireball
magic.description: Hurls small fireballs. Can hurl up to 3 at a time.

magic.name: Big Fire
magic.description: Hurls large fireballs. Can hurl up to 2 at a time.

magic.name: Explosion
magic.description: Hurls giant fireballs that cause explosions on impact, damaging their surroundings.

magic.name: Water Laser
magic.description: Emits a water beam that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain it, the bigger the impact.

magic.name: Parallel Laser
magic.description: Emits 2 water beams that can penetrate stone. The longer you maintain them, the bigger the impact.

magic.name: Delta Laser
magic.description: Emits 3 water beams that can penetrate stone. Particularly effective when surrounded by foes.

magic.name: Screw Rock
magic.description: Summons sharp rocks that substitute for your fists. Designed for fighter mages.

magic.name: Earth Spike
magic.description: Summons stone pillars that track enemies and strike them from below.

magic.name: Avenger Rock
magic.description: Stabs its target with a large rock. Also known as the "drill punch."

magic.name: Sonic Wind
magic.description: Emits spinning wind blades that automatically track and shred their foes to pieces.

magic.name: Double Sonic
magic.description: Emits 2 spinning wind blades. Their arched trajectory makes it hard to attack enemies in front.

magic.name: Penetrate Sonic
magic.description: Emits 3 spinning wind blades that move freely in multiple directions, shredding to bits all who get in their way.

magic.name: Light Barrier
magic.description: Emits 2 light balls in front of you, protecting from enemies.

magic.name: Shine
magic.description: Emits 4 light balls that spin around you, protecting you from enemies.

magic.name: Prism
magic.description: Emits spinning light balls. Provides complete protection from all enemies for a short while.

magic.name: Dark Ball
magic.description: Emits a dark light ball that travels slowly that travels slowly and destroys everything in its way.

magic.name: Dark Snake
magic.description: Emits a dark light ball that snakes forward slowly and destroys everything in its path.

magic.name: Darkness
magic.description: Forbidden spell that summons an entrance to the depths of darkness.

magic.name: Cure
magic.description: Recovers HP, for yourself and for nearby companions. Doesn't recover much, but uses few RP.

magic.name: Cure All
magic.description: Recovers a lot of HP for you and your companions, even if they're not close by. Uses lots of RP.

magic.name: Master Cure
magic.description: Greatly recovers HP, but consumes a large amount of RP in the process.

magic.name: Medipoison
magic.description: Cures poison.A purifying light will cleanse the toxins in your body.

magic.name: Mediparalyze
magic.description: Cures paralysis.A purifying light will enable you to move once more.

magic.name: Mediseal
magic.description: Cures seals.A purifying light will bring back your inner power.

magic.name: Greeting Spell
magic.description: If you say hello, even people who don't like you will say hi back. They'll be your special friends. Your special awake friends.

runeAbility.name: Power Wave
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Short SwordCharge power to release shock waves.

runeAbility.name: Dash Slash
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Short SwordClose the gap between enemies in an instant. Good timing may net you an additional leg drop.

runeAbility.name: Rush Attack
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Short SwordPress the button repeatedly for additional attacks and a finisher.

runeAbility.name: Round Break
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Short SwordA cyclone attack that blows away foes. Great to use when surrounded.

runeAbility.name: Mind Thrust
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Short SwordFind and attack your enemy's weak point. May inflict status ailments as well.

runeAbility.name: Gust
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Dual BladesJump up and soar in the air. Also useful for dodging attacks.

runeAbility.name: Storm
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Dual BladesExecute continuous attacks in the air. Keep pressing the button for additional moves.

runeAbility.name: Blitz
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Dual BladesSpeed up attack rate by sharpening concentration.

runeAbility.name: Twin Attack
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Dual BladesStab, twist and pull -- like a psychotic mantra. Simple but effective.

runeAbility.name: Rail Strike
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Dual BladesA jump-spin attack. Dynamic and hard to counter.

runeAbility.name: Wind Slash
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Long SwordA vertical jump-spin attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins.

runeAbility.name: Flash Strike
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Long SwordBlow away foes with one swing. Covers wide areas very effectively.

runeAbility.name: Naive Blade
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Long SwordAnticipate your enemy's attacks and quickly strike back.

runeAbility.name: Steel Heart
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Long SwordBecome strong enough not to stagger when attacked, but take more damage.

runeAbility.name: Delta Strike
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Long SwordA fluid attack of lunging and cutting.

runeAbility.name: Hurricane
runeAbility.description: Weapon: SpearA fancy attack with a toss, spin and juggle.

runeAbility.name: Reaper Slash
runeAbility.description: Weapon: SpearLong-ranged attack. Best when surrounded.

runeAbility.name: Millionstrike
runeAbility.description: Weapon: SpearA swift stab. Creates shock waves to hit multiple times.

runeAbility.name: Axel Disaster
runeAbility.description: Weapon: SpearSpinning and boring. Must face the enemy head-on to inflict continuous damage.

runeAbility.name: Stardust Upper
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerKnock enemies into the air. They can also be attacked while spinning.

runeAbility.name: Tornado Swing
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerSpinning lunge attack. Keep pressing the button to increase the number of spins. Just don't make yourself dizzy!

runeAbility.name: Grand Impact
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerHit the ground and cause an earthquake. Press the button for multiple hits.

runeAbility.name: Giga Swing
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Axe/HammerWith its incredible strength, enemies are blown back until they hit something.

runeAbility.name: Upper Cut
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistLaunch enemies into the air.

runeAbility.name: Double Kick
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistSpin and kick enemies so hard.

runeAbility.name: Straight Punch
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistConcentrate and give foes a strong blow.

runeAbility.name: Neko Damashi
runeAbility.description: Weapon: Open HandA legendary technique using palm of the hand to cause distress and surprise all in one.

runeAbility.name: Rush Punch
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistPunch many times at high speed. enemies are already dead.

runeAbility.name: Cyclone
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistBlow away enemies by spinning your body super fast.

runeAbility.name: Rapid Move
runeAbility.description: Weapon: FistMove toward an enemy in an instant. Also useful to dodge attacks.

special.name: Bonus Concerto
special.description: a musical score that inspires allied monsters to do their best in combat.

special.name: Striking March
special.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' strength until the end of the day.

special.name: Iron Waltz
special.description: A musical score that powers up allied monsters' defense until the end of the day.

other.name: Material Stone
other.description: Stones needed to build buildings. Always keep a lot of them in stock -- they will absolutely come in handy!

other.name: Lumber
other.description: Wood needed to build buildings. Always keep a lot of them in stock -- they will absolutely come in handy!

other.name: Branch
other.description: A tree branch that blew in. Chop it up with an axe to make Lumber.

other.name: Rock
other.description: An ordinary rock. Hit it with a hammer to make usable material out of it.

recipeBread.name: Medicine Bread
recipeBread.description: A magic bread that teaches you new recipes. You can learn one (simple) recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Medicine Bread+
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Medicine Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Cooking Bread
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Cooking Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Cooking Bread+
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Cooking Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Weapon Bread
recipeBread.description: A magic bread that teaches you new recipes. You can learn one (simple) recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Weapon Bread+
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Weapon Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Accessory Bread
recipeBread.description: A magic bread that teaches you new recipes. You can learn one (simple) recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Accessory Bread+
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Accessory Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Farming Bread
recipeBread.description: A magic bread that teaches you new recipes. You can learn one (simple) recipe appropriate to your skill.

recipeBread.name: Farming Bread+
recipeBread.description: A nicely baked Farming Bread. Teaches you a difficult recipe appropriate to your skill.
